name: LaunchIgniter
description: Product launch directory that pairs day-one exposure with a lasting do-follow backlink for SEO; audience is indie makers and SaaS founders who want both launch traffic and durable link-building value.

auth.notes: Free email/password account to submit. Listings include a do-follow link back to your site; paid/featured tiers add priority placement and faster review.

best_practices: LaunchIgniter passes a do-follow backlink, so use your exact primary domain as the URL to maximise SEO equity to the page you want ranked.
Write a keyword-rich description that naturally includes the terms you want to rank for, while staying readable.
Make the tagline both compelling and keyword-aware so it doubles as launch copy and SEO anchor context.
Choose the most accurate category and tags; relevant placement improves both discovery and the backlink's topical value.
Complete every field and add a logo and screenshots so the listing looks credible to both visitors and search crawlers.
Link to a fast, indexable landing page (not a redirect) so the do-follow link points at a crawlable destination.
Submit on a planned launch day so referral traffic from the listing compounds with your other channels.

questions.label: Website URL
questions.help: Use your exact primary domain to capture the do-follow backlink.

questions.label: Description
questions.help: Keyword-rich but readable explanation of what it does and who it's for.

questions.label: Tags / keywords
questions.help: Include the keywords you want associated with the listing.

questions.label: Screenshots
questions.help: Images of the product to build credibility.
